scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/agent-runtime packages/mcp packages/local-api apps/cli && chmod +x apps/cli/dist/index.js
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b --pretty false packages/core packages/agent-runtime packages/mcp packages/local-api apps/cli
scripts.lint: tsc -b --pretty false packages/core packages/agent-runtime packages/mcp packages/local-api apps/cli
